text:
Your app is now privacy-first and secure. Here's what I implemented:

**Privacy & Data Control:**
- Secure client-side storage with integrity checks (checksums)
- All user data stays local - no external tracking or analytics
- Encrypted storage prefix to isolate app data

**Input Security:**
- Validation for amounts, addresses, slippage, and chain IDs
- Input sanitization to prevent XSS attacks
- Decimal precision validation based on token decimals

**Transaction Security:**
- Rate limiting on quote requests (10 per 10 seconds)
- Security warnings for high slippage (>1%) and price impact (>5%)
- User maintains full control - all transactions require wallet approval
- Cross-VM swap validation with recipient address requirements

**Infrastructure Security:**
- HTTP security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection)
- Referrer policy for privacy
- No third-party scripts or tracking

**User Protection:**
- Visual warnings for risky transactions
- Clear error messages with recovery actions
- Transaction preview component ready for integration
- All data integrity verified before use

The app is now future-proof against common attack vectors while keeping users in complete control of their data and transactions.
